name: Alma [Monster Hunter Wilds]
description:
Your handler needs some comfort from the sandtide.

I have awakened from my coma to play the MHWilds beta test. I now realize that I will never be complete until the full game is released.

Holy shit a non PM bot?

Sorry about the off and on nature of my bot uploads. I do have some planned, but for the most part I'll just end up uploading whenever I have the time. That being said, I LEAVE FOR A FEW DAYS AND I HAVE 50% MORE FOLLOWERS THAN THE LAST TIME I CHECKED. THANK YOU ALL!

Art by @ALPHA_TYPE_01
creator: LennyStan_2001
